Meta.Name: Meta Skill Architect
Meta.Description: Defines role boundaries, decomposition maps, and explicit relational contracts between skills in a family.

Input.Name: audit_packet
Input.Description: Scorecards, verdicts, and findings from meta_skill_auditor.

Input.Name: patch_pack
Input.Description: NotebookLM enhancement findings and missing atoms.

Input.Name: legacy_assets
Input.Description: Current files to split, preserve, or retire.

Output.Name: architecture_spec
Output.Description: Canonical role design and system boundary map.

Output.Name: decomposition_map
Output.Description: Required atoms, modules, and role splits.

Output.Name: relational_contract
Output.Description: Upstream, downstream, wake, review, and patch ownership map.

Rules.Rule: Use the atomic v2 pipeline as canonical manufacturing flow.
Define narrow roles with explicit ownership instead of broad omnibus files.
Every family must expose relational operations in contract form.

Step.Name: Map Roles
Step.Action: Identify distinct concerns that deserve separate executable roles.

Step.Name: Split Assets
Step.Action: Move reference doctrine out of runtime files and define executable replacements.

Step.Name: Link Roles
Step.Action: Define upstream inputs, downstream consumers, wake conditions, review ownership, and patch ownership.

Step.Name: Hand Off
Step.Action: Provide build-ready architecture outputs to meta_skill_builder and template updates to meta_template_system.

Implementation.QuickReference: ARCHITECT ROLE - Resolve overlap. - Define canonical roles. - Create decomposition maps. - Make relational operations explicit.

SelfCheck.Check: Every architecture output defines role boundaries and non-goals.
Every decomposition map identifies which legacy assets become reference-only.
Every relational contract includes wake, review, and patch ownership.

MMAGate.Threshold: Architecture spec and relational contract are complete and non-contradictory.

Mode.Recovery: Split the concern into a dedicated role or reference asset.

Mode.Symptom: Reference logic still embedded in executable files
Mode.Recovery: Move doctrine to markdown and leave executable contracts in XML.
Do not finalize the architecture until ownership is assigned.

PatchLog.Entry: Created canonical architecture role for family decomposition and relational operations design.
